parameters.query: UPDATE uploaded_contracts SET schedule_detection_status = 'processing' WHERE contract_id = $1::uuid;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, contractId: $('Validate Input').first().json.contractId, schedulesDetected: $('Process Detection Response').first().json.scheduleCount, missingRequired: $('Process Detection Response').first().json.missingExpected.filter(m => m.is_required).length, summary: $('Process Detection Response').first().json.detectionSummary }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'Schedule detection failed' }) }}
